name: self-host
description: Personal self-hosted Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: rust-skills
plugins.description: Comprehensive Rust development assistant with meta-question routing, coding guidelines, version queries, and ecosystem support

plugins.name: search
plugins.description: Comprehensive web search and research toolkit — Tavily MCP (search/extract), Tavily CLI skills (search/extract/crawl/map/research), and agent-browser for browser automation

plugins.name: isaac-sim
plugins.description: NVIDIA Isaac Sim 具身智能开发工具包 — 场景编排、机器人资产管线、物理仿真、导航、抓取、传感器、渲染、SDG、USD 管线等完整技能链

plugins.name: tools
plugins.description: Utility tools — book-to-skill converter and more

plugins.name: finance
plugins.description: Financial trading skills — Hyperliquid copy-trade, candlestick analysis

plugins.name: science
plugins.description: AI research assistant powered by alphaXiv MCP — discover papers, read content, query PDFs, explore GitHub code, and manage your library

plugins.name: dioxus
